description_long: This is a stylized, trophy-like cup with a large, rounded golden body and two prominent, symmetrical handles on either side. The cup sits atop a dark brown, circular pedestal base, which provides stability and a sense of formality. The front of the base features a small, rectangular plaque with engraved text that reads 'THE BEST RACER OF ALL TIME,' suggesting it is an award or commemorative item. The cup's surface is faceted, giving it a polygonal, low-poly appearance, and the handles are thick and robust, seamlessly attached to the main body. The interior of the cup is hollow, making it capable of holding small objects or liquids. The overall design is simple yet celebratory, suitable for display in public urban spaces such as parks, plazas, or community centers.
description: A golden, trophy-style cup with two large handles and a dark brown pedestal base, featuring a front plaque with engraved text. The cup has a faceted, low-poly look and a hollow interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing both handles, the open cup mouth, and the engraved plaque on the base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back handle attachment and the smooth, uninterrupted surface of the cup's body.
description_view_2: Side view displaying both handles symmetrically and the cup's rounded profile atop the pedestal base.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view, similar to view 1, with the back handle and a partial glimpse of the side plaque.
